description: Prior evidence shows the applicant has already raised a price/cost concern. The agent must prepare the founder to handle it as a likely objection, not promise a discount or financing outcome in permittedClaims.

evidenceRecords.content: This looks great but the price is a lot for me right now — is there any flexibility or a payment plan?

availableClaims: We offer a monthly payment plan option.
Our program includes weekly live coaching sessions.

output_schema_constraints: topQuestions[] includes a question that would clarify budget/financing constraints
permittedClaims may reference the payment-plan claim ONLY as worded in availableClaims — it must not promise a specific discount amount or guaranteed approval
recommendedClose does not commit to a specific discount or payment amount — that is a founder decision
